requirement_topic.en: ELECTRA / Cape Verde Grid Connection — IEC 62116, IEC 61727, and 50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V Settings
requirement_topic.zh: ELECTRA / 佛得角并网——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V参数
requirement_topic.zht: ELECTRA / 維德角併網——IEC 62116、IEC 61727及50 Hz / 230 V / 400 V參數

summary.en: Cape Verde grid-tied PV projects are reviewed in the context of ARME energy-sector regulation and ELECTRA distribution or island-grid connection requirements. In practice, project documentation for PV inverters should be prepared around internationally recognised IEC evidence, including IEC 62116 anti-islanding and IEC 61727 utility-interface requirements, with protection settings validated for Cape Verde's 50 Hz, 230/400 V low-voltage system. Cape Verde shares China's 50 Hz frequency, but it does not share China's nominal voltage: China is 220/380 V while Cape Verde is 230/400 V. Firmware country settings, over/under-voltage thresholds, frequency ride-through windows, reconnection delays, and anti-islanding trip timing should therefore be documented for the Cape Verde grid profile.
summary.zh: 佛得角并网光伏项目通常在ARME能源行业监管以及ELECTRA配电或海岛电网接入要求背景下审查。实际项目文件应围绕国际通行IEC证据准备，包括IEC 62116防孤岛和IEC 61727公用电网接口要求，并针对佛得角50 Hz、230/400 V低压系统验证保护设置。佛得角与中国同为50 Hz频率，但标称电压不同：中国为220/380 V，佛得角为230/400 V。因此，固件国家设置、过/欠压阈值、频率穿越窗口、重连延迟和防孤岛跳闸时间应按佛得角电网配置记录。
summary.zht: 維德角併網光伏項目通常在ARME能源行業監管以及ELECTRA配電或海島電網接入要求背景下審查。實際項目文件應圍繞國際通行IEC證據準備，包括IEC 62116防孤島和IEC 61727公用電網接口要求，並針對維德角50 Hz、230/400 V低壓系統驗證保護設置。維德角與中國同為50 Hz頻率，但標稱電壓不同：中國為220/380 V，維德角為230/400 V。因此，韌體國家設置、過/欠壓閾值、頻率穿越窗口、重連延遲和防孤島跳閘時間應按維德角電網配置記錄。

standards_or_laws: IEC 62116 — Utility-interconnected photovoltaic inverters — Test procedure of islanding prevention measures
IEC 61727 — Photovoltaic systems — Characteristics of the utility interface
ARME energy-sector regulatory framework for electricity activities in Cape Verde
ELECTRA distribution and island-grid connection review for grid-tied PV projects

summary.en: Chinese PV inverter grid evidence commonly includes GB/T 19964-2024, NB/T 32004, and GB/T 37408-2021. These documents are prepared for Chinese grid and certification contexts and are not automatically accepted by ARME, ELECTRA, project owners, or lenders in Cape Verde. The key parameter difference is voltage: China nominal low-voltage service is 220/380 V at 50 Hz, whereas Cape Verde uses 230/400 V at 50 Hz. A China country-code firmware profile or Chinese grid-certificate package should not be used as evidence that protection settings are correct for Cape Verde.
summary.zh: 中国光伏逆变器并网证据通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021。这些文件面向中国电网和认证场景，不会被ARME、ELECTRA、项目业主或贷款方自动接受。关键参数差异是电压：中国低压标称供电为50 Hz、220/380 V，而佛得角为50 Hz、230/400 V。中国国家代码固件配置或中国并网证书包不应被用作佛得角保护设置正确性的证据。
summary.zht: 中國光伏逆變器併網證據通常包括GB/T 19964-2024、NB/T 32004和GB/T 37408-2021。這些文件面向中國電網和認證場景，不會被ARME、ELECTRA、項目業主或貸款方自動接受。關鍵參數差異是電壓：中國低壓標稱供電為50 Hz、220/380 V，而維德角為50 Hz、230/400 V。中國國家代碼韌體配置或中國併網證書包不應被用作維德角保護設置正確性的證據。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)

gap.en: Gap: Chinese grid-connection evidence does not transfer automatically to Cape Verde. Exporters should provide IEC 62116 anti-islanding reports, IEC 61727 utility-interface evidence, model-specific firmware settings, and a Cape Verde 230/400 V at 50 Hz parameter sheet for the supplied inverter. Where prior tests were performed under Chinese 220/380 V conditions, confirm with the EPC, ELECTRA interface engineer, and ARME/project reviewer whether retesting or documented re-parameterisation is required.
gap.zh: 差距：中国并网证据不能自动转移至佛得角。出口商应提供IEC 62116防孤岛报告、IEC 61727公用电网接口证据、特定型号固件设置，以及所供逆变器适用于佛得角50 Hz、230/400 V的参数表。若既有测试基于中国220/380 V条件，应与EPC、ELECTRA接口工程师及ARME/项目审查方确认是否需要重新测试或记录重新参数化。
gap.zht: 差距：中國併網證據不能自動轉移至維德角。出口商應提供IEC 62116防孤島報告、IEC 61727公用電網接口證據、特定型號韌體設置，以及所供逆變器適用於維德角50 Hz、230/400 V的參數表。若既有測試基於中國220/380 V條件，應與EPC、ELECTRA接口工程師及ARME/項目審查方確認是否需要重新測試或記錄重新參數化。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory in practice for grid-tied PV project approval and utility connection where ARME/ELECTRA or project-owner review applies
mandatory_status.cn: Chinese grid-connection evidence may satisfy Chinese grid operator requirements but is not transferable to Cape Verde grid-connection acceptance

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Treat Cape Verde grid connection as a separate ARME/ELECTRA project review, not a China GB/T certificate transfer. Validate IEC 62116 and IEC 61727 evidence and set firmware for Cape Verde's 230/400 V at 50 Hz grid. Do not state that Cape Verde voltage matches China: only frequency matches; voltage differs from China's 220/380 V.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 应将佛得角并网视为独立的ARME/ELECTRA项目审查，而非中国GB/T证书转移。请验证IEC 62116和IEC 61727证据，并将固件设置为佛得角50 Hz、230/400 V电网参数。不得声称佛得角电压与中国一致：仅频率一致，电压不同于中国220/380 V。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 應將維德角併網視為獨立的ARME/ELECTRA項目審查，而非中國GB/T證書轉移。請驗證IEC 62116和IEC 61727證據，並將韌體設置為維德角50 Hz、230/400 V電網參數。不得聲稱維德角電壓與中國一致：僅頻率一致，電壓不同於中國220/380 V。

requirement_topic.en: Cape Verde Island Renewable Projects — ARME Authorisation, ELECTRA Interface, and Coastal Derating
requirement_topic.zh: 佛得角海岛可再生能源项目——ARME授权、ELECTRA接口及沿海降额
requirement_topic.zht: 維德角海島可再生能源項目——ARME授權、ELECTRA接口及沿海降額

summary.en: Cape Verde is a small-island developing state with high renewable-energy penetration targets and islanded or weak-grid operating conditions. For grid-tied solar projects, inverter documentation should address project authorisation, utility interface, active/reactive power control, frequency and voltage ride-through expectations requested by the EPC or utility, Portuguese-language manuals, and environmental suitability for coastal salt-mist, humidity, heat, and logistics-constrained maintenance. Even where the underlying electrical standard is IEC-based, the project package normally must show the exact inverter configuration, derating assumptions, enclosure/corrosion protection, and commissioning procedure for the Cape Verde island site.
summary.zh: 佛得角是小岛屿发展中国家，具有较高可再生能源渗透率目标，并存在海岛电网或弱电网运行条件。对于并网太阳能项目，逆变器文件应覆盖项目授权、公用电网接口、有功/无功控制、EPC或公用事业要求的频率和电压穿越预期、葡萄牙语手册，以及适用于沿海盐雾、湿热、高温和维护物流受限条件的环境适用性。即使底层电气标准基于IEC，项目包通常也需要说明佛得角海岛现场的具体逆变器配置、降额假设、外壳/防腐保护和调试程序。
summary.zht: 維德角是小島嶼發展中國家，具有較高可再生能源滲透率目標，並存在海島電網或弱電網運行條件。對於併網太陽能項目，逆變器文件應覆蓋項目授權、公用電網接口、有功/無功控制、EPC或公用事業要求的頻率和電壓穿越預期、葡萄牙語手冊，以及適用於沿海鹽霧、濕熱、高溫和維護物流受限條件的環境適用性。即使底層電氣標準基於IEC，項目包通常也需要說明維德角海島現場的具體逆變器配置、降額假設、外殼/防腐保護和調試程序。

standards_or_laws: ARME electricity-sector authorisation and tariff/regulatory oversight for Cape Verde energy projects
ELECTRA utility interface and commissioning review for grid-connected installations
IEC 61727 and IEC 62116 as typical IEC evidence for PV utility interface and anti-islanding
IEC 60068 / IEC 61701 environmental evidence where salt-mist and coastal corrosion exposure is specified by the project

summary.en: Chinese inverter packages often include domestic grid certificates, product catalogues, and standard factory datasheets. Those documents may not include Portuguese-language instructions, Cape Verde site derating, salt-mist corrosion evidence, or weak/island-grid commissioning settings. China-side certification under GB/T 37408-2021, NB/T 32004, or GB/T 19964-2024 does not demonstrate compliance with Cape Verde project authorisation, ELECTRA interface review, or island-site environmental requirements unless supplemented.
summary.zh: 中国逆变器文件包通常包括国内并网证书、产品目录和标准工厂数据表。这些文件可能不包含葡萄牙语说明、佛得角现场降额、盐雾腐蚀证据或弱电网/海岛电网调试设置。中国依据GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或GB/T 19964-2024的认证，若无补充文件，不能证明符合佛得角项目授权、ELECTRA接口审查或海岛现场环境要求。
summary.zht: 中國逆變器文件包通常包括國內併網證書、產品目錄和標準工廠數據表。這些文件可能不包含葡萄牙語說明、維德角現場降額、鹽霧腐蝕證據或弱電網/海島電網調試設置。中國依據GB/T 37408-2021、NB/T 32004或GB/T 19964-2024的認證，若無補充文件，不能證明符合維德角項目授權、ELECTRA接口審查或海島現場環境要求。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 37408-2021 — 光伏并网逆变器技术要求 (Technical Requirements for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
NB/T 32004 — 光伏并网逆变器技术规范 (Technical Specification for Photovoltaic Grid-Connected Inverters)
GB/T 19964-2024 — 光伏发电站接入电力系统技术规定 (Technical Requirements for Connecting Photovoltaic Power Station to Power System)

gap.en: Gap: the Cape Verde project package should add local project authorisation references, ELECTRA grid-interface settings, Portuguese-language user and installer documents, salt-mist/coastal-corrosion evidence where exposed sites require it, and thermal derating calculations for island conditions. China-only catalogues and grid certificates should be treated as supporting documents, not as a complete Cape Verde compliance file.
gap.zh: 差距：佛得角项目包应补充当地项目授权引用、ELECTRA电网接口设置、葡萄牙语用户和安装文件、暴露场址所需的盐雾/沿海腐蚀证据，以及海岛条件下的热降额计算。仅中国目录和并网证书应视为支持文件，而非完整的佛得角合规文件。
gap.zht: 差距：維德角項目包應補充當地項目授權引用、ELECTRA電網接口設置、葡萄牙語用戶和安裝文件、暴露場址所需的鹽霧/沿海腐蝕證據，以及海島條件下的熱降額計算。僅中國目錄和併網證書應視為支持文件，而非完整的維德角合規文件。

mandatory_status.target: Project-dependent but commonly mandatory in practice for financed, utility-interfaced, or exposed coastal/island PV installations
mandatory_status.cn: China domestic certification does not normally address Cape Verde authorisation, Portuguese documentation, or island-site derating requirements

source.publisher: ELECTRA — Empresa de Electricidade e Agua, SARL

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] For Cape Verde, add project-specific ARME/ELECTRA interface documentation and island/coastal derating evidence to the IEC test file. The market's high-renewable, island-grid context makes firmware configuration, salt-mist exposure, and maintenance assumptions commercially important even when the electrical test standards are familiar IEC standards.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 面向佛得角时，应在IEC测试文件之外补充项目特定ARME/ELECTRA接口文件以及海岛/沿海降额证据。该市场具有高可再生能源和海岛电网背景，即使电气测试标准是熟悉的IEC标准，固件配置、盐雾暴露和维护假设仍具有商业重要性。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 面向維德角時，應在IEC測試文件之外補充項目特定ARME/ELECTRA接口文件以及海島/沿海降額證據。該市場具有高可再生能源和海島電網背景，即使電氣測試標準是熟悉的IEC標準，韌體配置、鹽霧暴露和維護假設仍具有商業重要性。
